name: Frontier AI Risk Management Framework
description: Comprehensive framework for managing severe risks from general-purpose AI models — published collaboratively by Shanghai AI Laboratory and Concordia AI. Adapts NIST AI RMF principles to frontier-model risk surface.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety governance framework targeting frontier capability tiers.
